data.title: Sidus Space prices offering of 10.8M shares at Nasdaq (SIDU) for innovative space tech company.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, Sidus Space, Inc. disclosed the pricing details of their best-efforts offering. The company, listed as SIDU on Nasdaq, released 10,800,000 shares of its Class A common stock to the market. Sidus, a pioneer in space and defense technology, is making this move to raise funds and potentially expand its operations. This latest development marks a significant step for the company in the realm of investment and growth.
Brent Crude futures settle at $60.64/bbl, down $1.60, 2.57%

data.title: AudioOne's "The Jay Walker Show" achieves milestone with 100M downloads on premium audio network.
data.description: In Beverly Hills, California, and Nashville, Tennessee, on December 26, 2025, AudioOne, an audio network, revealed that "The Jay Walker Show" has achieved a milestone by surpassing 100 million listeners. The show offers premium content and comprehensive support for prominent personalities in various fields.

data.title: Alphabet Inc. leads tech giants with 66% gains in 2025. 8 ETFs from abroad surpass it, with iShares MSCI Greece ETF up 73%.
data.description: Alphabet Inc's parent company Google's shares (NASDAQ: GOOG, GOOGL) have seen a 66% increase year-to-date, outperforming other mega-cap tech giants like Nvidia Corp (NASDAQ: NVDA) at 42%. However, the real surprise lies in global markets, with eight country ETFs delivering stronger returns than Alphabet. These include iShares MSCI South Africa ETF (EZA) up 67.3%, iShares MSCI Austria ETF (EWO) up 67.9%, Global X – MSCI Colombia ETF (COLO) up 68.5%, iShares MSCI Poland ETF (EPOL) up 68.6%, and iShares MSCI Spain ETF (EWP) up 73%. The story is available on Benzinga.com for more details on global investment performance beyond Big Tech.

data.title: Law firm in Orlando helps tourists injured in car accidents while on vacation, attracting millions of visitors annually.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on December 26, 2025, The Law Offices of Jason Turchin, a personal injury law firm, provides assistance to tourists and non-residents involved in car accidents while visiting the area. Orlando, a popular destination, attracts millions of tourists annually for its theme parks and attractions.

data.title: Bitcoin struggles at $88K while Aave deals with governance issues. Crypto markets see minor rebound as spot Bitcoin ETFs drop for five straight days due to year-end low liquidity.
data.description: This week, cryptocurrency markets saw a slight improvement with a modest recovery, however, spot Bitcoin ETFs continued a five-day decline due to low year-end liquidity.

data.title: Top games of 2025 under $20: Indie titles defy pricey hardware and AAA costs, offering players numerous options to explore.
data.description: Have some extra holiday money to spare? A variety of independent games are standing out in the market, offering players a great selection of options for $20 or less amid increasing hardware and AAA game prices.

data.title: Fitell Corp declares interim dividend, offers shareholder loyalty program to boost value to investors.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, Fitell Corporation (NASDAQ: FTEL) declared two initiatives to benefit shareholders. The board of directors announced an interim dividend payout and a one-time shareholder loyalty program to increase investor alignment with the Company's growth strategy. These measures aim to return value to shareholders while strengthening long-term relationships with an evolving growth-focused strategy.

data.title: US proposes using Ukraine's Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant for crypto mining amid negotiations with Russia. Plant under Russian control since 2022, with unresolved disputes over safety and control.
data.description: The United States has suggested utilizing Ukraine's Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant, Europe's biggest nuclear facility, for cryptocurrency mining amid negotiations with Russia. The plant, under Russian administration since 2022 and formerly crucial for Ukraine's energy grid, is now a focal point in talks. The proposal's feasibility is uncertain due to ongoing disagreements regarding supervision and safety. Various strategies are being considered, with Russia asserting...Further details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Miami Beach ranks as the priciest New Year's Eve destination globally for accommodation, per Cheaphotels.org's survey of 60 major cities.
data.description: Miami Beach has been identified as the priciest place to stay for New Year's Eve, topping the global list in accommodation costs, as per a study conducted by Cheaphotels.org. The research analyzed hotel rates in 60 prominent cities around the world. It evaluated the cost of the least expensive room available for booking to determine the rankings.

data.title: Coupang stock rises as internal probe reveals data breach was smaller than feared. (Character count: 82)
data.description: Coupang, a major e-commerce company in South Korea, has announced that an internal investigation revealed a data breach that was smaller than originally anticipated. Following this news, Coupang's stock witnessed a significant surge, indicating investor confidence in the company's ability to effectively handle the situation. This development was highlighted in an article by Investor's Business Daily, showcasing the market's positive response to the news. The specific numbers regarding the extent of the data breach and the subsequent stock rally were not provided in the rephrased information.

data.title: USX briefly breaks peg on Solana DEXs before recovery with added liquidity support.
data.description: The USX stablecoin experienced a momentary drop below its one-dollar peg on decentralized exchanges (DEXs) in the Solana network. However, it quickly rebounded after the issuer provided additional liquidity to the secondary markets. The stability was restored, and USX returned to its intended value.
